calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Dec-29-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: William Lu telephone number 650-716-7500 Defendant in Propria Persona.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

Mr. Lu informed the Court that he did not provide notice to the opposing party of his intent to contest the tentative ruling. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF NEW FALLS CORPORATION'S Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is denied in part. Sherriff shall levy $150.00 per month from Defendant. Order signed.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/EG)
